component.name: Node-RED Contrib MultiFlexi
component.summary: Node-RED nodes for visual MultiFlexi process orchestration

description.p: Manage relationships between MultiFlexi processes visually in Node-RED. The multiflexi-eventor daemon forwards webhook changes and finished jobs to these nodes, and flows schedule RunTemplates in response, turning the arrows you draw into orchestration logic.

ul.li: multiflexi-event — receives forwarded events over HTTP
multiflexi-runtemplate — schedules a RunTemplate via the REST API
multiflexi-artifact — splits a finished-job event into per-artifact messages

description.p: Supports optional X-MultiFlexi-Token header validation with the secret stored encrypted in Node-RED credentials.
